# paystack-sdk-go

> A comprehensive, zero-dependency, production-grade Go SDK for the Paystack API. Covers all 24 Paystack services with auto-idempotency, generic pagination iterators, strongly typed enums, and fully mockable service interfaces.

## Key Facts

- Module: `github.com/samaasi/paystack-sdk-go`
- Go version: 1.18+ (uses generics)
- Zero external dependencies
- All methods accept `context.Context`

## Installation

```bash
go get github.com/samaasi/paystack-sdk-go
```

## Initialization

```go
import paystack "github.com/samaasi/paystack-sdk-go"

client := paystack.NewClient(os.Getenv("PAYSTACK_SECRET_KEY"))
// Options: WithTimeout, WithMaxRetries, WithBaseURL, WithHTTPClient
```

## Core Concepts

### Typed Enums (paystackapi package)
Avoid magic strings. Use provided constants:
- `paystackapi.CurrencyNGN`, `CurrencyGHS`, `CurrencyUSD`, `CurrencyZAR`, `CurrencyKES`
- `paystackapi.ChannelCard`, `ChannelBank`, `ChannelUSSD`, `ChannelMobileMoney`, `ChannelBankTransfer`
- `paystackapi.StatusSuccess`, `StatusFailed`, `StatusPending`, `StatusAbandoned`
- `paystackapi.BearerAccount`, `BearerSubaccount`

### Metadata
All requests that support metadata use `paystackapi.Metadata` (a `map[string]interface{}`).

### Error Handling
Errors return `*paystackapi.APIError`. Use `errors.As` to inspect:
```go
var apiErr *paystackapi.APIError
if errors.As(err, &apiErr) {
    fmt.Println(apiErr.StatusCode, apiErr.Message)
}
```

### Idempotency
The SDK auto-generates a UUIDv4 `Idempotency-Key` for every POST/PUT request.
To supply your own key:
```go
ctx = paystackapi.WithIdempotencyKey(ctx, "your-unique-key")
```

### Pagination Iterator
```go
iter := paystackapi.NewIterator(func(ctx context.Context, page, perPage int) (paystackapi.Response[[]transactions.VerifyData], error) {
    resp, err := client.Transactions.List(ctx, &transactions.ListTransactionParams{
        Page:    &page,
        PerPage: &perPage,
    })
    if err != nil {
        return paystackapi.Response[[]transactions.VerifyData]{}, err
    }
    return resp.Response, nil
})

for iter.Next(ctx) {
    tx := iter.Value()
}
if err := iter.Err(); err != nil { ... }
```

### Webhook Verification
```go
// HMAC signature check + IP allowlist
if !webhook.IsFromPaystackIP(r) { /* reject */ }
event, err := webhook.Verify(r, secretKey)
```

### Mocking in Tests
Every service is exposed as an interface. Use gomock or write a hand-rolled stub:
```go
type MockTransactions struct{ ... }
func (m *MockTransactions) Initialize(...) { ... }

client.Transactions = &MockTransactions{}
```

## Services

| Field | Package | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `client.Transactions` | `service/transactions` | Initialize, Verify, List, Charge, Timeline |
| `client.Customers` | `service/customers` | Create, Fetch, Update, Whitelist/Blacklist |
| `client.Transfers` | `service/transfers` | Initiate, Finalize, Bulk transfers |
| `client.TransferRecipients` | `service/transfer-recipients` | Create, List, Update, Delete |
| `client.TransferControl` | `service/transfer-control` | Balance, Balance Ledger, Resend OTP |
| `client.Plans` | `service/plans` | Create, Fetch, List, Update |
| `client.Subscriptions` | `service/subscriptions` | Create, Fetch, List, Toggle |
| `client.PaymentPages` | `service/payment-pages` | Create, Fetch, List, Update |
| `client.PaymentRequests` | `service/payment-requests` | Create, Fetch, List, Verify |
| `client.Charges` | `service/charges` | Create, Submit PIN/OTP/Phone/Birthday |
| `client.BulkCharges` | `service/bulk-charges` | Initiate, List, Fetch batches |
| `client.Refunds` | `service/refunds` | Create, List, Fetch |
| `client.Disputes` | `service/disputes` | List, Fetch, Resolve, Export |
| `client.Products` | `service/products` | Create, Fetch, List, Update |
| `client.Splits` | `service/splits` | Create, Fetch, List, Update |
| `client.Subaccounts` | `service/subaccounts` | Create, Fetch, List, Update |
| `client.Settlements` | `service/settlements` | List, Fetch transactions |
| `client.Verification` | `service/verification` | Resolve Account, Card BIN |
| `client.Terminal` | `service/terminal` | Send event, Fetch, Commission |
| `client.ApplePay` | `service/apple-pay` | Register, List, Unregister domains |
| `client.VirtualAccounts` | `service/virtual-accounts` | Create, Assign, List, Deactivate |
| `client.Integration` | `service/integration` | Timeout settings |
| `client.Misc` | `service/misc` | Banks, Countries, States |
| `client.Status` | `service/status` | API health check |

## Full Documentation

https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/samaasi/paystack-sdk-go
